title: Jeju Grande Bleu Yacht: A Price Guide for Romantic Getaways in 2026
content:
Jeju Island beckons with its serene landscapes, and for couples seeking an unforgettable romantic experience, the Grande Bleu Yacht offers an escape onto the tranquil waters. As we navigate June 2026, with the gentle summer breeze upon us, many of you might be planning your next romantic getaway or honeymoon. Having recently indulged in the sheer elegance of a Grande Bleu Yacht tour from Daepo Port, I'm here to share not just the beauty, but a clear price guide to help you budget for this luxurious excursion.

Unveiling the Grande Bleu Experience from Daepo Port

Our journey began at Daepo Port in Seogwipo, where the majestic catamaran sailing yacht awaited. This isn't just any boat; it's a floating sanctuary, the largest of its kind in Korea, designed for ultimate comfort and stability. With a licensed captain and engineer onboard, a sense of calm immediately enveloped us, knowing safety was paramount. The yacht boasts a total capacity of 91 guests, split between Yacht 550 (seating 44) and Yacht 620 (seating 47), ensuring ample space for everyone to enjoy the views. The 1-hour duration allows for a perfect blend of exploration and relaxation, showcasing the breathtaking Daepo coastline without overwhelming your schedule.

Deciphering the Tour Options and Price Points for 2026

Grande Bleu offers two distinct tours, each promising its own magic. Understanding the pricing is key to planning your perfect romantic outing. Here’s a breakdown of the 2026 rates:

  • Luxury Tour: This daytime journey offers pristine views of the coastline. The adult regular price is ₩60,000, and for children, it's ₩40,000. Keep an eye out for promotional rates, which can bring the adult fare down to ₩48,000 and the child fare to ₩28,000.
  • Sunset Tour: For those yearning for a more romantic ambiance, the Sunset Tour paints the sky with fiery hues. The adult regular price stands at ₩70,000, and children at ₩40,000. Promotional rates make it even more enticing, with adult tickets available for ₩56,000 and child tickets for ₩28,000.

These rates offer couples the flexibility to choose an experience that aligns with their budget and romantic vision. You can book your tour through various partner platforms like Naver, Klook, KKday, and Ctrip/Trip.com, making it incredibly convenient to secure your spot.

Coastal Wonders and Culinary Delights

As we glided across the calmest waters of Jeju, the yacht offered unparalleled views of iconic landmarks. We marveled at the hexagonal pillars of Wolpyeong Jusangjeolli, peered into the mysterious Wolpyeong Sea Cave, and spotted the distinctive Elephant Rock. The Daepo coastline unfolded before us, a tapestry of natural artistry. What truly enhanced our journey was the generous onboard refreshments: unlimited draft beer, wine, refreshing Jeju tangerine juice, bottled water, assorted snacks, and even warm cup ramen. It truly elevated the experience from a simple tour to a luxurious cruise.
